content: maxTicksPerTree default is 100_000 (not 1000) in both configuration.ts and settings-repository.ts default row.

name: tick-range-queries
description: TickRepository range queries: findRange(from,to) uses inclusive WHERE tickId >= / <=; findBefore uses DESC order + reverse() to return ascending results; getTickBounds uses MIN/MAX/COUNT aggregate — returns null when count=0.

content: TickBounds domain type uses totalCount (not count) for the aggregate count field; DB query aliases it as 'count' but the domain maps it to totalCount on return.

name: range-endpoint-limit
description: tRPC range endpoints accept optional limit param (min 1, max 10000) passed through to repository; repository applies .limit() only when defined.

name: byte-metrics-service
description: ByteMetricsService: per-tree key clientId::sessionId::treeId, MAX_SAMPLES=500 ring buffer (shift oldest), RATE_WINDOW_MS=5000ms. record() pushes ByteSample{tickId,bytes,timestamp}. query() returns rate=windowBytes/5, totalBytes, samples. tRPC endpoint: byteMetrics.perTree. Connection interface exposes lastRawByteSize updated per WS/TCP message.

name: repl-broker-deferred-pattern
description: ReplBroker deferred-promise pattern: pending Map<correlationId, {resolve,reject,timer}>; sendEval/sendCompletions generate UUID correlationId, send PluginMessage (t=7) to agent via CommandSenderInterface, return promise.finally(cleanup); handleAgentResponse resolves by correlationId. Port of Frostmod ReplWaiterService adapted for correlationId strings instead of seq numbers.

name: runtime-settings-ref
description: RuntimeSettingsRef pattern: a mutable object { maxTicksPerTree: number } seeded from DB at startup, updated via SettingsUpdated event handler — used by TickBatchHandler to avoid DB reads on every tick batch

content: commandTimeoutMs is initialized from DB settings at startup (not from config), and CommandBroker.updateTimeoutMs() is called on SettingsUpdated so runtime changes via the API take effect immediately

name: deserialize-log-on-failure
description: WS and TCP JSON serializers inject a Logger and call logger.warn() on Zod schema parse failure instead of silently returning undefined

name: prune-atomic-transaction
description: TickRepository.pruneToLimit wraps count+select+delete in executeTransactionally to prevent TOCTOU race with concurrent insertBatch calls

content: ByteMetricsService.clearByAgent(clientId, sessionId) must be called on AgentDisconnected to prevent unbounded Map growth for disconnected clients

name: repl-broker-nacl-relay
description: ReplBroker NaCl relay: handshake (correlationId='handshake') decodes headerToken, opens session seed with serverSecretKey, derives directional keys (c2s/s2c) per connectionId. sendEval/sendCompletions encrypt payload with s2c key. handleAgentMessage decrypts agent response with c2s key. removeConnection() clears session.

name: plugin-attach-buffering
description: PluginMessageBuffer in StudioAgent buffers messages sent synchronously during attach() (e.g. ReplPlugin handshake) and replays them on first connected event. After attach() returns, stopBuffering() switches to direct-passthrough mode. This prevents handshake loss when StudioLink.sendMessage() drops messages before the WebSocket is in Connected state.

name: repl-eval-await-expression
description: ReplPlugin.isProbablyExpression() must special-case await expressions: new Function() cannot test await in a non-async context (SyntaxError), so await expressions were incorrectly classified as statements and returned undefined. Fix: if trimmed code starts with 'await[\s(]' and has no semicolons, treat as expression. In expression path the code runs inside async IIFE so await works correctly.
